mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD (BOARD_NUM, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, USER_NUM, Board_Category) VALUES(#{boardNum}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{userNum}, #{boardCategory})
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD SET BOARD_TITLE = #{boardTitle}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{boardContent}, BOARD_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NUM = #{boardNum} AND USER_NUM = #{userNum}
UPDATE TBL_BOARD SET BOARD_HIT = BOARD_HIT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NUM = #{boardNum}
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NUM, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_REGISTER_DATE, BOARD_HIT, B.USER_NUM, USER_ID, BOARD_UPDATE_DATE, BOARD_CATEGORY FROM TBL_USER U JOIN TBL_BOARD B ON BOARD_NUM = #{boardNum} AND U.USER_NUM = B.USER_NUM
SELECT COUNT(BOARD_NUM) FROM TBL_BOARD WHERE BOARD_CATEGORY = #{category}

SELECT R, BOARD_NUM, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_REGISTER_DATE, BOARD_HIT, USER_NUM, BOARD_UPDATE_DATE, BOARD_CATEGORY, USER_ID FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM R, BOARD_NUM, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_REGISTER_DATE, BOARD_HIT, USER_NUM, BOARD_UPDATE_DATE, BOARD_CATEGORY, USER_ID FROM ( SELECT BOARD_NUM, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_REGISTER_DATE, BOARD_HIT, B.USER_NUM, BOARD_UPDATE_DATE, BOARD_CATEGORY, USER_ID FROM TBL_USER U JOIN TBL_BOARD B ON BOARD_CATEGORY = #{category}
AND U.USER_NUM = B.USER_NUM ORDER BY BOARD_NUM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE R >= #{startRow}
